description: This file defines Express.js route handlers for orchestration-related API endpoints, managing build workflows, document linking, extraction, normalization, draft generation, and finalization within a server-side application.

methods.name: router.post('/start')
methods.description: Starts a new orchestration session and build workflow.

methods.name: router.post('/run-all')
methods.description: Runs the entire build workflow end-to-end in a single call.

methods.name: router.get('/builds/:id')
methods.description: Retrieves the orchestration record for a specific build ID.

methods.name: router.post('/builds/:id/link-upload')
methods.description: Links an upload and documents to an existing build.

methods.name: router.post('/builds/:id/extract-normalize')
methods.description: Derives normalized text from linked documents for a build.

methods.name: router.post('/builds/:id/generate-draft')
methods.description: Generates a persona draft from normalized text.

methods.name: router.post('/builds/:id/regenerate-draft')
methods.description: Regenerates a persona draft, supporting versioning and draft saving.

methods.name: router.post('/builds/:id/finalize')
methods.description: Finalizes a persona, saving the final blob and creating a new version if needed.

methods.name: router.post('/finalize')
methods.description: Convenience route to finalize a build by buildId in the request body.

methods.name: router.post('/regenerate-draft')
methods.description: Convenience route to regenerate a draft by buildId in the request body.
